Spring Data MongoDB
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.annotation

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.annotation

Packages that use org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.annotation
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index
Support for MongoDB document indexing.
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.mapping
Infrastructure for the MongoDB document-to-object mapping subsystem.
org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository
MongoDB specific repository implementation.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.annotation used by org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index
    Class
    Description
    Collation
    Collation allows to define the rules used for language-specific string comparison.
